# analyze-github-repositories
Description: Analyze one or more GitHub repositories for structure, branching, CI/CD, documentation, and overall health.
Source: project
1. Provide the URLs of the GitHub repositories you want to analyze.
2. The analysis will be performed in parallel for all provided repositories.
3. The process involves reviewing the repository's structure, branching strategy, CI/CD presence, documentation, and overall health.
4. Wait for the analysis to complete.
5. A full audit for all repositories will be provided once the results are ready.
